info.title: rental-crm-back
info.description: Landlord CRM backend -- record-keeping-first. All clients bind only to this contract.

code.description: Stable, machine-readable code. Clients branch on this; never on message.

post.summary: Create a user + account atomically
Exchange credentials for a session
Refresh an access token using a refresh token
Revoke session(s) per scope

get.summary: Identify the caller and list their account memberships

post.summary: Create a property
Create a vendor
Create a tenant

get.summary: List areas in an account (filterable by property_id and kind)

post.summary: Create an area (unit or common area)

patch.summary: Update an area (name only; kind is immutable)

get.summary: Get unit-only attributes for an area
List tenancies (filterable by area_id and status)

post.summary: Create a tenancy (on a unit-kind area)

patch.summary: Update a tenancy (status / end_date only; area_id is immutable)

post.summary: Add a tenant to a tenancy with a role

get.summary: List leases (filterable by tenancy_id and status)

post.summary: Create a lease attached to a tenancy
Create an asset attached to an area
Set the end_date on a schedule (history-preserving end)
Void a charge (history-preserving; original row stays visible)
Record a received payment, optionally with allocations
Void a payment (history-preserving; original row stays visible)
Add an allocation against an existing payment

get.summary: Per-tenancy ledger: charges + payments + allocations + derived balances
List a tenancy's intake tokens (current and revoked; never the secret)

post.summary: Mint a fresh intake token for the tenancy. Returns the secret EXACTLY ONCE.
Revoke an active intake token

patch.summary: Update a maintenance request (status changes go through server-enforced transitions)

post.summary: Log a contact (offline call, doorstep conversation, etc.). logged_at is server-set.
Upload an attachment (multipart). Hash + path computed server-side.

patch.summary: Patch an inspection (rejected with 409 if already completed)

post.summary: Mark an inspection complete; locks it AND stores the rendered PDF as a content-hashed attachment

delete.summary: Soft-delete an inspection item (rejected with 409 if the parent inspection is completed)

post.summary: Generate a tamper-evident evidence bundle PDF
Upload a spreadsheet/CSV; parse, recognize, and suggest a mapping (multipart).

delete.summary: Soft-delete an import session (created records are kept)

patch.summary: Confirm or override the column-to-field mapping
Resolve required-parent ambiguity (default property / per-name overrides)

post.summary: Ask the assistant to explain or revise the mapping

get.summary: List parsed rows for a session

post.summary: Dry-run the import (transaction rolled back) and return the would-be result
Commit the import. Returns 409 if unresolved blockers remain.
Submit a maintenance request via tenant magic link
